case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. VICTOR R KUBARA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR R SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-06-2011
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25 ONLY
